data.name: ZV's Edge
data.description: AI-powered sports betting PWA (mobile-first for iPhone) — FastAPI backend + React/Vite frontend.
data.nextStep: Add a calibration guardrail (blend model with market-implied / cap model-vs-market divergence / recalibrate tails) so picks don't over-flag longshots, then re-run live.
data.lastDid: Built pick generation (picks.py + run_picks.py): vig removal, 5% edge threshold, edge ranking into POTD + Next Best, FD/DK line shopping, push-aware EV, 'no play'. Verified offline + run live. Found the model over-flags longshots (ridge shrinkage compresses fav/dog gap) — needs a calibration guardrail.
data.notes: Buildful stack (Vite/FastAPI), unlike the Hub. Scaffold only so far — no betting features yet. No git remote set up.

data.name: Neil AI Hub
data.nextStep: Make repo private (split into public app + private data repo)
data.notes: Centralized hub for all AI-related projects.

data.name: Neil Portfolio
data.description: Single-page personal portfolio site (static HTML/CSS/JS, no build step). Hero, About, Experience, Skills, Education, Certifications, plus a keyword-matching FAQ chat bot. Live on GitHub Pages.
data.lastDid: Confirmed site is live on GitHub Pages (HTTP 200); reconciled stale 'not yet hosted' note and filled in the Hub card.
data.nextStep: Decide on polish items: real LLM-backed chat, downloadable resume PDF link, or fix the 'Piscataway, NJ' chip that links to nowhere.
